description: [ELON] Create ShopifySyncService with methods: fetchRecentOrders() (pulls last 7 days of orders via Shopify Admin API), syncOrder() (inserts/updates single order in DB), and reconcile() (compares Shopify order count vs. DB count, flags discrepancies). Use Shopify GraphQL Admin API for efficient queries. Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for rate limit errors (429). Log all sync operations to activity_log.
successCriteria: fetchRecentOrders() returns array of orders from Shopify API
syncOrder() inserts new order into shopify_orders table
syncOrder() updates existing order if order_number already exists
reconcile() detects when DB has fewer orders than Shopify
Rate limit errors trigger exponential backoff retry (3 attempts max)
